message:
fix(security): detect backslash and quote obfuscation bypass attempts

Add normalization to handle command obfuscation techniques:
- Internal backslash escapes: g\it → git (bash treats \i as literal i)
- Mixed quoting concatenation: g'i't → git (bash concatenates sections)

Also fix quick-reject logic to not skip evaluation early when command
contains potential obfuscation characters (backslash, quotes). This
ensures normalize_command() is called to reveal hidden keywords before
deciding to skip pack evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
